rule_metadata.name: ft_exe
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Simple signature to trigger on PE files.

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_exe
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20141217"
		desc = "Simple signature to trigger on PE files."

	strings:
		$mz = "MZ"

	condition:
		$mz at 0
}
